name: heroboard
description: Heroboard: gamified dev board for Claude Code — MCP task tools, effort heartbeats (Monkey/Agent time), and /heroboard commands.

api_key.title: Heroboard API key
api_key.description: Get one in Heroboard → Settings → MCP → “+ New key”. Stored securely in your system keychain. In the Claude app, run the plugin in a terminal once so effort hooks can read it.

presence_ticker.title: Continuous presence ticker
presence_ticker.description: Keep effort accruing every ~60s while a session is open — even when you're watching a long agent run and not typing. On by default; turn off to count only prompt/edit events.
